titleZh: 上市公司治理准则（2018年修订）
titleEn: Code of Corporate Governance for Listed Companies (2018 Revision)
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 在 2002 年治理准则基础上按现代上市治理要求全面修订的关键文本，是 2025 年治理准则出台前的主要适用版本。
summaryEn: The key modernized revision of the governance code built on the 2002 text and the principal governing version before the 2025 revision.
applicablePeriodZh: 2018年9月30日起适用，至 2025 年新版治理准则生效前为主要现行版本。
applicablePeriodEn: Applied from September 30, 2018, and remained the principal version until the 2025 code took effect.

sources.label: Official English (reference)
sources.noteZh: 证监会英文站保留的官方英文参考件，用于对照 2018 年修订后的治理条款。
sources.noteEn: Official English reference file preserved on the CSRC English site for comparison with the 2018 governance revision.
